items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence suggests shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, showing that small increases in activity among the least active can yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项通讯支持将运动建议从“目标”转变为“分钟数”，强调即使是少量增量运动也能带来显著的群体健康益处。在临床咨询中，你可以用这个视角鼓励久坐患者，突出小步快跑的价值，而不是宏大的活动量目标。
items.titleZh: 从目标到分钟：让运动建议更具可操作性
items.summaryZh: 这篇通讯提出，将运动量建议从理想阈值转变为可实现的边际增益，表明即使是活动量最少的人群，小幅度的活动增加也能带来最大的群体效益，与世卫组织指南相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence supports shifting physical activity advice from 'targets' to 'minutes,' highlighting that even small incremental movements can yield significant population health benefits. In clinical consultations, you can use this perspective to encourage sedentary patients, emphasizing the value of small, achievable gains over ambitious activity goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为通讯，未提供原始研究设计和数据，且结论依赖于此前已发表的文章，可能存在二次解读的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This correspondence does not provide original study design or data, and its conclusions rely on previously published articles, potentially limiting secondary interpretation.
items.journal: The Lancet

items.title: Modified Ghost System combining action, observation, and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol
items.summary: A single-arm feasibility study protocol introduces a modified Ghost System, combining iPad-based action observation and wristband vibration, for rehabilitation after distal radius fracture surgery in 10 adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项单臂可行性研究引入了一种结合 iPad 动作观察和腕带振动的改良 Ghost 系统，用于桡骨远端骨折术后康复。这只是一项方案研究，探讨技术整合的可行性，离实际临床应用还有距离，目前不应根据它改变你的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 改良 Ghost 系统结合动作观察与振动刺激，用于桡骨远端骨折术后康复：一项单臂临床可行性研究方案
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂可行性研究方案介绍了改良 Ghost 系统，该系统结合了基于 iPad 的动作观察和腕带振动刺激，旨在评估其在 10 名桡骨远端骨折术后成人康复中的应用潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This single-arm feasibility study introduces a modified Ghost System combining iPad-based action observation and wristband vibration for post-distal radius fracture surgery rehab. It's merely a protocol exploring technical integration feasibility, far from clinical application, so don't alter your rehab protocols based on it yet.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心、单臂的可行性研究方案，样本量小（10例），无对照组，主要关注技术的可行性而非临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center, single-arm feasibility study protocol with a small sample size (10 cases) and no control group, focusing on technical feasibility rather than clinical efficacy.

items.title: Undernutrition is associated with higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation: a longitudinal observational study
items.summary: A longitudinal observational study investigating the association between undernutrition and various outcomes post-dysvascular major lower limb amputation found that undernutrition is linked to higher reamputation rates, lower mobility, and reduced quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 对于截肢患者，营养状况不佳不仅仅是伴随问题，它还与更差的移动能力、更低的生存率和更高的再截肢风险相关。在康复过程中，务必筛查并管理患者的营养状态。
items.titleZh: 血管性下肢大截肢后营养不良与更高的再截肢率或生存率、更低的活动能力和生活质量相关：一项纵向观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项纵向观察性研究发现，在血管性下肢大截肢术后，营养不良与更高的再截肢率、更低的活动能力和较差的生活质量相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Undernutrition in amputee patients is not merely a comorbidity; it is associated with poorer mobility, lower survival rates, and a higher risk of reamputation. Ensure you screen for and manage nutritional status during rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which cannot establish causality and may be subject to confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study of 479 propensity score-matched patients found that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation was associated with a reduced risk of post-stroke dementia compared to physical rehabilitation alone in adults aged ≥55 years who developed MCI within 6 months after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 对卒中后认知障碍患者，除了传统物理康复，别忘了评估和转诊认知康复。这项回顾性研究提示，结合认知康复可能显著降低患者发展为卒中后痴呆的风险。
items.titleZh: 物理与认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆发生率的关联：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究，对479名倾向评分匹配的卒中后轻度认知障碍患者（年龄≥55岁）进行分析，结果显示，与单独物理康复相比，物理与认知联合康复与卒中后痴呆发生风险降低相关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: For post-stroke cognitive impairment patients, in addition to traditional physical rehabilitation, remember to assess for and refer to cognitive rehabilitation. This retrospective study suggests that combined cognitive rehabilitation may significantly reduce the risk of developing post-stroke dementia.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性队列设计，且数据来源于电子健康记录，可能存在混杂因素和信息偏差。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study using electronic health record data, which may introduce confounding factors and information bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-center RCT (n=54) found that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding for 14 days improved gastric motility and swallowing recovery, and reduced reflux risk compared to continuous nasogastric tube feeding in patients with post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中后吞咽困难患者，间歇性口咽管喂养相对于鼻胃管喂养可能提供更好的胃动力和吞咽恢复效果。如果你目前常规使用鼻胃管，这项研究提示你可以开始考虑间歇性口咽管作为替代方案，尤其是在降低反流风险方面。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难患者间歇性口咽管喂养与鼻胃管喂养的多模式评估、反流风险及临床疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单中心随机对照试验（n=54）显示，对于卒中后吞咽困难患者，为期14天的间歇性口咽管喂养在改善胃动力、促进吞咽恢复和降低反流风险方面优于持续鼻胃管喂养。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with post-stroke dysphagia, intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding may offer better gastric motility and swallowing recovery compared to nasogastric tube feeding. If you routinely use nasogastric tubes, this study suggests you might consider intermittent oro-esophageal tubes as an alternative, particularly for reducing reflux risk.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心研究，样本量较小（54例），结果外推至其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center study with a small sample size (54 patients), so results should be generalized with caution.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: A systematic review of randomized controlled trials investigated the effectiveness of various physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis (EDSS score ≤6.0), concluding that while exercise may be beneficial, specific effects remain unclear due to diverse interventions and outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述肯定了物理运动在多发性硬化症（MS）痉挛管理中的重要性，但指出了缺乏统一的运动方案和对长期效果的关注。这提示你应将运动作为MS痉挛的非药物干预选项，但具体方案需结合患者情况进行个体化设计。
items.titleZh: 物理运动对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述调查了不同物理运动干预对多发性硬化症（EDSS评分≤6.0）患者痉挛的有效性，提示运动可能有效，但具体效果因干预措施多样性而不明确。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review affirms the importance of physical exercise in managing spasticity in multiple sclerosis (MS) but highlights the lack of standardized exercise protocols and focus on long-term effects. This suggests you should consider exercise as a non-pharmacological intervention for MS spasticity, but specific programs require individualized design based on patient conditions.
items.limitation: 本系统综述的纳入研究在运动干预类型和结果评估方法上存在异质性，导致无法进行荟萃分析，仅能进行叙述性总结。
items.limitationEn: The included studies in this systematic review showed heterogeneity in exercise intervention types and outcome assessment methods, precluding meta-analysis and allowing only narrative synthesis.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists explored their knowledge, attitudes, and practices concerning motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, revealing widely spread interests but no specific findings on knowledge or practice gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这项小样本观察性研究初步勾勒了南非物理治疗师在卒中康复中对运动学习知识、态度和实践的现状。结果提示了知识和实践的潜在差距。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践
items.summaryZh: 一项针对40名南非物理治疗师的调查探讨了他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践，揭示了其兴趣的广泛分布。
items.curatedReasonEn: This small observational study provides an initial snapshot of South African physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. The findings suggest potential gaps between knowledge and practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本横断面调查，仅包含40名物理治疗师，且采用便利和滚雪球抽样，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This small cross-sectional survey included only 40 physiotherapists using convenience and snowball sampling, limiting the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Virtual Reality-assisted Physiotherapeutic Training for Patients With Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 5 RCTs found that virtual reality (VR)-assisted physiotherapy significantly improved pain (SMD = 0.40, 95% CI: 0.14-0.65, P = 0.002), physical function (SMD = 0.37, 95% CI: 0.05-0.70, P = 0.003), and balance (SMD = 0.44, 95% CI: 0.16-0.72, P = 0.002) in patients with knee osteoarthritis compared to traditional rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 对于膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者，VR 辅助物理治疗在缓解疼痛、改善身体功能和平衡方面显示出优于传统康复治疗的显著优势。它提供了可行的临床替代方案，值得你在实践中考虑引入。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实辅助物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的疗效：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 5 项随机对照试验（RCT）的系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，虚拟现实（VR）辅助物理治疗在改善膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛 (SMD = 0.40, P = 0.002)、身体功能 (SMD = 0.37, P = 0.003) 和平衡 (SMD = 0.44, P = 0.002) 方面，均优于传统康复治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with knee osteoarthritis (KOA), VR-assisted physiotherapy demonstrates significant advantages over traditional rehabilitation in pain relief, physical function, and balance. It offers a viable clinical alternative worth considering in your practice.
items.limitation: 本综述仅纳入 5 项 RCT，样本量可能限制了结果的普遍性，且未报告异质性数据。
items.limitationEn: This review included only 5 RCTs, which may limit the generalizability of results, and did not report heterogeneity data.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: A prospective cross-sectional study among sub-acute adult stroke survivors (within 6 weeks post-stroke) in the UK demonstrated that the Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties, with early-phase diagnostic accuracy assessed using ROC analysis and random forest analysis.
items.curatedReason: 牛津视知觉筛查（OxVPS）在亚急性成人卒中患者中能有效检测视知觉障碍。当你早期筛查卒中患者时，可以考虑引入 OxVPS 作为辅助工具，帮助及时识别并干预这些容易被忽视的问题。
items.titleZh: 牛津视知觉筛查量表可在亚急性成人卒中幸存者中检测视知觉障碍：一项早期横断面诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在英国进行的亚急性成人卒中幸存者（卒中后 6 周内）前瞻性横断面研究表明，牛津视知觉筛查量表（OxVPS）能有效检测视知觉障碍，并通过受试者工作特征曲线（ROC）分析和随机森林分析评估了早期诊断准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors. When screening stroke patients early, consider incorporating OxVPS as an auxiliary tool to help identify and intervene in these often-overlooked issues promptly.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且是在英国特定康复单位进行，结果外推性需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size and specific UK rehabilitation unit setting limit generalizability, requiring further validation.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries found that the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) mandatory bundled payment model did not significantly affect the proportion of hospitals delivering lower extremity joint replacement prehabilitation in CJR treatment areas compared to control areas.
items.curatedReason: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）服务交付的影响，直接关系到你在美国 Medicare 患者群体中的执业模式。如果 CJR 模式确实减少了术前康复，你需要评估如何应对这种支付政策变化，以确保患者能获得必要的术前准备。
items.titleZh: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 62,217 名 Medicare 受益者的双重差分分析发现，综合关节置换护理（CJR）强制性捆绑支付模式并未显著影响 CJR 治疗区域医院提供下肢关节置换术前康复的比例，与对照区域相比。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of mandatory bundled payments on prehabilitation delivery for lower extremity joint replacement directly affects your practice model for Medicare patients in the US. If the CJR model truly reduces prehabilitation, you need to assess how to respond to this payment policy change to ensure patients receive necessary preoperative preparation.
items.limitation: 研究仅关注 Medicare 受益者和美国特定支付模式，结果不适用于其他国家或支付体系。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses solely on Medicare beneficiaries and a specific US payment model, so results are not applicable to other countries or payment systems.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 140 TIA and mild stroke participants found that a once-weekly 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6-minute walk test distance), physical activity, and quality of life over 6 months compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，集成心血管康复项目对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者的功能运动能力、身体活动和生活质量具有长期益处。在处理 TIA 或轻度卒中患者时，你应该积极推荐并整合这类康复服务，以改善他们的长期预后。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项对 140 名短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者进行的随机对照试验发现，每周一次、为期 6 周的心血管康复项目，与常规护理相比，在 6 个月内显著改善了功能运动能力（6 分钟步行试验距离）、身体活动和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial shows that integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation programs offer long-term benefits for functional exercise capacity, physical activity, and quality of life in patients with transient ischemic attack (TIA) and mild stroke. When managing TIA or mild stroke patients, you should actively recommend and integrate such rehabilitation services to improve their long-term prognosis.
items.limitation: 研究在大学健康中心进行，结果可能不完全适用于所有临床环境；患者为 TIA 或轻度卒中，重症患者的适用性未评估。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted at a university health center, and results may not be fully applicable to all clinical settings; applicability to severe stroke patients was not assessed as participants had TIA or mild stroke.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: Multimodal Integration of Gait, Balance, and Infrared Thermography Enhances Machine-Learning Classification of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: This cross-sectional study investigated whether combining gait, balance, and infrared thermography data enhances machine-learning classification between individuals with knee osteoarthritis (KOA) and healthy controls compared with single-domain models.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，多模态整合步态、平衡和红外热成像数据能有效提升机器学习模型对膝骨关节炎（KOA）的分类诊断能力。在临床实践中，你可以考虑结合多种评估手段，利用数据整合来提高 KOA 的早期诊断和鉴别诊断准确性。
items.titleZh: 步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态整合提升膝骨关节炎的机器学习分类能力：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究旨在调查，与单一领域模型相比，步态、平衡和红外热成像数据的多模态整合是否能提高机器学习模型对膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者与健康对照组的分类辨别能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that multimodal integration of gait, balance, and infrared thermography data can effectively improve machine learning models' classification accuracy for knee osteoarthritis (KOA). In clinical practice, you might consider combining multiple assessment methods and leveraging data integration to enhance early and differential diagnosis accuracy for KOA.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，不能提供 KOA 进展的纵向信息；机器学习模型的泛化能力需在更大样本和多中心数据中验证。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, unable to provide longitudinal information on KOA progression; the generalizability of machine learning models needs validation with larger samples and multi-center data.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blinded, sham-controlled trial with 49 participants found that ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation (PENS) applied to the radial nerve, combined with exercise, provided mid- and long-term benefits for chronic lateral elbow pain, improving pain intensity, disability, and psychological outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性外侧肘痛（网球肘），经皮电神经刺激（PENS）结合运动在中长期随访中显示出显著疗效。当你遇到药物和传统方法效果不佳的患者时，可以考虑将 PENS 作为辅助干预手段，但需注意其定位精度和患者选择。
items.titleZh: 超声引导经皮电神经刺激联合运动治疗慢性外侧肘痛的中长期疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 49 名患者的随机、双盲、假对照试验发现，超声引导的经皮电神经刺激（PENS）应用于桡神经并结合运动，对慢性外侧肘痛（网球肘）在中长期随访中具有益处，改善了疼痛强度、残疾和心理结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic lateral elbow pain (tennis elbow), percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation (PENS) combined with exercise shows significant efficacy in mid- to long-term follow-up. When encountering patients with inadequate response to medication and traditional methods, consider PENS as an adjunctive intervention, paying attention to its precise targeting and patient selection.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（49 例），可能影响结果的外推性；长期随访数据有限。
items.limitationEn: The study's small sample size (49 cases) may limit generalizability, and long-term follow-up data are limited.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: This secondary analysis of an RCT investigated adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, evaluating adherence to pain thresholds and physiotherapy sessions among 84 patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动依从性的研究，提醒我们关注疼痛阈值与治疗依从性的复杂关系。在设计康复方案时，不仅要考虑运动本身，还应优化疼痛管理策略以提高患者依从性。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对慢性肩袖肌腱病患者的随机对照试验（RCT）次级数据分析，调查了在 26 周运动干预中两种疼痛阈值方案的依从性，评估了 84 名患者对疼痛阈值和物理治疗会话的依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on exercise adherence in patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy highlights the complex relationship between pain thresholds and treatment adherence. When designing rehabilitation programs, you should optimize pain management strategies in addition to the exercises themselves to improve patient compliance.
items.limitation: 本研究为 RCT 的次级数据分析，重点关注依从性而非干预疗效，且依从性数据可能存在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This study is a secondary data analysis of an RCT, focusing on adherence rather than intervention efficacy, and adherence data may be subject to bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: An economic evaluation alongside an RCT in Brazil found that a Pilates exercise program for chronic non-specific low back pain had limited cost-effectiveness compared to home-based exercises from both healthcare and societal perspectives, especially when considering the lack of insurance coverage for Pilates.
items.curatedReason: 这项巴西的研究提示，与家庭运动相比，普拉提对慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益可能有限。在临床实践中，你需要平衡治疗效果与患者的可及性和经济负担，特别是当普拉提不被医保覆盖时。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与家庭运动治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项在巴西进行的随机对照试验（RCT）的经济学评估显示，从医疗和社会角度来看，普拉提运动项目治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益，与家庭运动相比可能有限，尤其考虑到普拉提缺乏医保覆盖。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Brazilian study suggests that Pilates may have limited cost-effectiveness for chronic non-specific low back pain compared to home-based exercises. In clinical practice, you need to balance treatment efficacy with patient accessibility and financial burden, especially when Pilates is not covered by insurance.
items.limitation: 该经济学评估仅限于巴西的医疗系统，结果可能不适用于其他国家；患者年龄范围受限（18-50岁）。
items.limitationEn: This economic evaluation is limited to the Brazilian healthcare system, and results may not be applicable to other countries; the patient age range is restricted (18-50 years).
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the effects of experimentally induced acute low back pain on force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics (recruitment threshold, firing rate, and action potential amplitude) during a sustained spinal extension task in 33 healthy participants.
items.curatedReason: 这项实验性研究有助于我们理解急性腰痛对运动单位行为的即时影响。它为未来更精准的康复干预提供了生理学基础，但目前尚不直接指导临床决策。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛时腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了在持续脊柱伸展任务中，实验诱导急性腰痛对 33 名健康参与者力量稳定性及运动单位放电特征（募集阈值、放电频率和动作电位幅度）的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This experimental study helps us understand the immediate effects of acute low back pain on motor unit behavior. It provides a physiological basis for future, more precise rehabilitation interventions, but does not directly guide clinical decisions at present.
items.limitation: 研究对象为健康人群的实验性疼痛诱导模型，结果外推到真实临床患者需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study used an experimentally induced pain model in healthy participants, and results should be extrapolated to real clinical patients with caution.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies, including 29 RCTs, to explore the range, characteristics, and outcomes of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, as well as the outcome measures used for assessment.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 29 项 RCT 的范围综述，证实了生活方式干预对膝骨关节炎的广泛应用前景。它提醒你，在 KOA 患者教育和个体化治疗中，除运动外，饮食、体重管理等同样关键。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎个体化生活方式干预的探索：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述纳入了 36 项研究（含 29 项随机对照试验），旨在探索膝骨关节炎（KOA）生活方式干预的范围、特征和结果，以及所使用的评估指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review, encompassing 29 RCTs, confirms the broad applicability of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis. It reinforces that beyond exercise, aspects like diet and weight management are equally crucial in KOA patient education and individualized treatment.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估，纳入研究的证据等级可能参差不齐。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not assess quality, and the evidence levels of included studies may vary.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients at a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital assessed the prevalence, patterns, treatment effectiveness, and cost of physiotherapy for musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs), finding a mean age of 47.8 ± 25.7 years and a predominantly female patient population.
items.curatedReason: 这项尼日利亚的回顾性研究揭示了当地物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病（MSDs）的患病率、模式、治疗效果和成本。它提供了特定区域的真实世界数据，可作为跨文化实践和医疗政策制定的参考。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果和成本
items.summaryZh: 一项在尼日利亚大学教学医院对 1582 名患者进行的 10 年回顾性研究，评估了物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病（MSDs）的患病率、模式、治疗效果和成本，发现平均年龄为 47.8 ± 25.7 岁，患者以女性为主。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study from Nigeria reveals the prevalence, patterns, treatment effectiveness, and costs of physiotherapy-managed musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs) in the region. It provides real-world data for a specific area, which can serve as a reference for cross-cultural practice and healthcare policy development.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，数据质量和完整性可能受限；结果为单一机构数据，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective study with potential limitations in data quality and completeness; single-institution data with limited generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: This study developed evidence-based physical therapy protocols for patients after surgical resection of bone tumors and reconstruction with megaprostheses, through an explorative literature search and a two-stage consensus procedure involving orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists. Protocols were developed for six different megaprostheses.
items.curatedReason: 这份关于骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体置换患者的物理治疗协议提供了基于证据的实践指导。它可以帮助你为这类复杂病例制定更规范、更安全的康复计划，提升治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体置换患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过探索性文献检索和包含骨肿瘤外科医生及物理治疗师的两阶段共识程序，为骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体置换的患者制定了基于证据的物理治疗方案，共涉及六种不同巨型假体。
items.curatedReasonEn: These physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection address a significant gap in clinical guidance. The specific instructions for six different types of megaprostheses will help you manage the postoperative rehabilitation of these complex cases more safely and effectively.
items.limitation: 协议是基于探索性文献检索和专家共识程序制定的，缺乏高级别证据的直接验证。
items.limitationEn: The protocols were developed based on an exploratory literature search and expert consensus, lacking direct validation from high-level evidence.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: An explorative qualitative study with interviews explored the expectations and experiences of patients with hip or knee osteoarthritis regarding physical therapist-led (PT-led) orthopedic triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic, highlighting perceptions of care quality, participation in decision-making, and fulfillment of assessment expectations.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提示我们，膝髋骨关节炎患者对 PT 主导分诊的期望远不止于临床评估。在瑞典的实践经验表明，确保患者充分参与决策和感受被理解，对提升整体满意度至关重要。
items.titleZh: 安全之手——膝髋骨关节炎患者对二级护理中物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 一项通过访谈进行的探索性定性研究，探讨了瑞典骨科诊所中膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导（PT-led）骨科分诊的期望和体验，强调了对护理质量、决策参与和评估期望满足度的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study suggests that hip and knee osteoarthritis patients' expectations for PT-led triage extend beyond clinical assessment. Experience from Sweden indicates that ensuring patient participation in decision-making and feeling understood are crucial for overall satisfaction.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小，结果不具统计学代表性，可能存在受访者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, lacking statistical representativeness and potentially subject to interviewee bias.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified current evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) for stroke rehabilitation, mapping study design, stimulation parameters, outcome measures, and reported effects. The review systematically searched five databases from inception to December 2025.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述指出了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复领域的潜力与局限。它提供了 tSCS 刺激参数和当前研究进展的概览，但鉴于其探索性质，目前仅适合作为未来 RCT 设计的参考。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激在卒中康复中的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统梳理了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复中的现有证据，包括研究设计、刺激参数、结局指标和报告效果。该综述系统检索了五个数据库，时间范围从开始至 2025 年 12 月。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review highlights both the potential and limitations of transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) in stroke rehabilitation. While it offers an overview of tSCS parameters and current research, its exploratory nature means it should currently only serve as a reference for future RCT design.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重于证据的映射和综合，未对纳入研究的质量进行深入评估。
items.limitationEn: The scoping review focuses on mapping and synthesizing evidence, without in-depth quality assessment of included studies.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Towards strengthening rehabilitation within health systems: a scoping review of rehabilitation-specific quality indicators
items.summary: A scoping review aimed to identify, categorize, and appraise rehabilitation-specific quality indicators (QIs) with generic applicability for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了康复特异性质量指标，强调了跨专业康复护理评估的重要性。它有助于你从更宏观的视角审视并优化自身服务，确保多学科协作下的治疗质量。
items.titleZh: 旨在加强卫生系统内康复服务的范围综述：康复特异性质量指标
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在识别、分类和评估具有通用适用性的康复特异性质量指标（QIs），以评估跨专业康复护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes rehabilitation-specific quality indicators, emphasizing the importance of evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care. It helps you take a broader view to assess and optimize your services, ensuring quality in multidisciplinary collaboration.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估，主要侧重于指标的识别和分类，可能未能深入探讨指标的实用性和验证情况。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not assess quality and primarily focus on indicator identification and categorization, potentially not delving deeply into indicator practicality and validation.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Task-Oriented training in a Patient with Triplegia: Post-Stroke Hemiparesis Complicating Pre-Existing Contralateral Upper Extremity Paralysis: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report of a 75-year-old man with pre-existing left upper extremity paralysis and new right hemiparesis after stroke demonstrated that intensive inpatient task-oriented training significantly improved Fugl-Meyer Assessment-UE scores from 3 to 43 by 23 weeks, sustained at 41 at 1 year, facilitating functional independence.
items.curatedReason: 这例三肢瘫痪卒中患者的任务导向训练案例报告，展示了特定康复策略在复杂病例中的应用潜力。它提示你在处理罕见或复杂神经功能障碍时，应灵活调整治疗方案以促进功能独立。
items.titleZh: 三肢瘫痪患者的任务导向训练：卒中偏瘫并发对侧上肢原有麻痹：一个病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一例 75 岁患者，在原有左上肢麻痹基础上，卒中后出现右侧偏瘫。病例报告显示，强化住院任务导向训练显著改善了其 Fugl-Meyer 评定量表-上肢（FMA-UE）分数，从 3 分提高至 23 周时的 43 分，并在 1 年时维持在 41 分，促进了功能独立。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report of task-oriented training in a triplegia stroke patient demonstrates the potential application of specific rehabilitation strategies in complex cases. It suggests that you should flexibly adjust treatment plans to promote functional independence when dealing with rare or complex neurological impairments.
items.limitation: 单病例报告，结果无法推广到其他患者群体。
items.limitationEn: Single case report; results cannot be generalized to other patient populations.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Retrospective analysis of the relationship between post-stroke fatigue and aphasia severity
items.summary: This retrospective analysis investigated the relationship between post-stroke fatigue, a common chronic condition affecting 25-85% of stroke survivors, and aphasia severity. It notes that fatigue impacts quality of life and long-term outcomes and is not reliably predicted by stroke type or physical impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性分析探讨了卒中后疲劳与失语严重程度之间的关系，揭示了卒中康复中一个重要的共病问题。这提醒你在评估卒中患者时，应同时关注疲劳和失语，考虑它们对整体功能恢复的影响。
items.titleZh: 卒中后疲劳与失语严重程度关系的追溯分析
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性分析探讨了卒中后疲劳（一种影响 25-85% 卒中幸存者的常见慢性病症）与失语严重程度之间的关系。研究指出疲劳影响生活质量和长期预后，且无法通过卒中类型或伴随的身体损伤可靠预测。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective analysis explores the relationship between post-stroke fatigue and aphasia severity, revealing a significant comorbidity in stroke rehabilitation. This reminds you to concurrently address fatigue and aphasia when evaluating stroke patients, considering their impact on overall functional recovery.
items.limitation: 回顾性分析，可能存在数据收集偏倚和混杂因素；研究没有给出明确的方法和结果数据。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective analysis, potentially subject to data collection bias and confounding factors; the study did not provide clear methods and results data.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Balance Stability Characteristics of Patients with Idiopathic Normal Pressure Hydrocephalus
items.summary: This study aimed to observe the postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究观察特发性正常压力脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题，有助于我们更深入理解这类患者的平衡障碍。这能指导你进行更精准的评估和针对性康复训练。
items.titleZh: 特发性正常压力脑积水患者的平衡稳定性特征
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在观察特发性正常压力脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study observing postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH) helps us better understand balance impairments in this population. This can guide you in performing more precise assessments and targeted rehabilitation training.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，不能建立因果关系；未报告具体样本量和研究方法细节，限制了对其结果的解读。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study and cannot establish causality; specific sample size and methodological details were not reported, limiting the interpretation of its results.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: APTA, Hartford HealthCare Launch Frailty Pilot to Advance Value-Based Care
items.summary: APTA and Hartford HealthCare Rehabilitation Network launched a pilot to test an early frailty identification and intervention model, positioning physical therapists at the forefront of prevention-first care for aging populations and advancing value-based care.
items.curatedReason: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 合作推出的虚弱早期识别和干预试点项目，突显了物理治疗师在价值导向型医疗中预防虚弱的关键作用。关注这一模式的实施和证据收集，它可能成为你实践中推广预防性 PT 服务的新范式。
items.titleZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 启动虚弱试点项目，推进价值导向型护理
items.summaryZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 康复网络共同启动了一项试点项目，旨在测试虚弱早期识别和干预模型，将物理治疗师置于老年人口预防性护理的前沿，并推动价值导向型护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA-Hartford HealthCare pilot program for early frailty identification and intervention highlights the critical role of physical therapists in value-based care. Monitor its implementation and evidence collection; this model could become a new paradigm for promoting preventive PT services in your practice.

items.title: The effects of resistance exercise with blood flow restriction on muscle performance, muscle mass, and function in older adults: a systematic review | European Review of Aging and Physical Activity
items.summary: This systematic review evaluated the effects of resistance exercise with blood flow restriction (BFR-RE) on muscle performance, muscle mass, and function in older adults, identifying it as a promising strategy for those unable to perform high-intensity resistance exercise.
items.curatedReason: 对于无法进行高强度抗阻训练的老年患者，血流限制抗阻训练（BFR-RE）是一个值得推荐的有效策略。这份系统综述确认了 BFR-RE 在改善肌肉表现、增加肌肉量和功能方面的效果，你应该考虑将其纳入老年患者的训练方案。
items.titleZh: 血流限制抗阻训练对老年人肌肉表现、肌肉质量和功能的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述评估了血流限制抗阻训练（BFR-RE）对老年人肌肉表现、肌肉质量和功能的影响，认为这是一种对无法进行高强度抗阻训练的老年人有前景的策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood flow restriction resistance exercise (BFR-RE) is an important strategy for improving muscle performance and function in older adults, especially those unable to perform high-intensity training. This systematic review evaluates the effects of BFR-RE, which can help you develop evidence-based training programs for elderly patients.
items.limitation: 综述的结论可能受限于纳入研究的异质性、方法学质量以及 BFR-RE 具体方案（如压力、时间、训练量）的差异。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of this review may be limited by the heterogeneity and methodological quality of included studies, as well as variations in BFR-RE protocols (e.g., pressure, duration, volume).

items.title: Frailty assessment and effect of physical activity interventions in older adults: a scoping review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression
items.summary: This scoping review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression evaluated frailty assessment and the effect of physical activity interventions in older adults, noting physical activity as a promising strategy to mitigate frailty despite heterogeneity in definitions and assessments.
items.curatedReason: 虚弱是老年人的重要健康问题，而体育活动是其重要的干预策略。这份系统综述、Meta 分析和 Meta 回归提供了虚弱评估和体育活动干预效果的全面证据，是你制定老年患者虚弱管理方案的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 老年人虚弱评估和体育活动干预效果：一项范围综述、Meta 分析和 Meta 回归
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述、Meta 分析和 Meta 回归评估了老年人虚弱的评估方法和体育活动干预的效果，指出体育活动是减轻虚弱的一种有前景的策略，尽管虚弱的定义和评估存在异质性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Frailty is a significant health issue in older adults, and physical activity is a crucial intervention strategy. This systematic review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression provide comprehensive evidence on frailty assessment and the effects of physical activity interventions, serving as an important reference for you to develop frailty management plans for older patients.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但体育活动干预方案的异质性以及虚弱定义和评估工具的多样性，可能影响结果的总体解释。
items.limitationEn: Despite being a systematic review, heterogeneity in physical activity intervention protocols and the diversity of frailty definitions and assessment tools may affect the overall interpretation of results.

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: This cross-sectional analysis of a population-based cohort (N=605) described the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction, including altered arousal, orgasmic dysfunction, female menstrual dysfunction, and male erectile and ejaculatory dysfunction, during primary spinal cord injury (SCI) rehabilitation in Switzerland.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤患者的性功能障碍是一个常被忽视但严重影响生活质量的领域。这份队列研究描述了 SCI 康复早期阶段性功能障碍的分布和风险因素，有助于你更全面地评估和讨论患者的康复需求。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初级康复期间的性功能：基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项基于人群队列的横断面分析（N=605）描述了瑞士脊髓损伤（SCI）患者在初级康复期间性功能障碍（包括性唤起改变、性高潮障碍、女性月经失调和男性勃起与射精功能障碍）的分布及风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sexual dysfunction in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) is an often-overlooked area that significantly impacts quality of life. This cohort study describes the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction during early SCI rehabilitation, which can help you comprehensively assess and discuss patient rehabilitation needs.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面分析，无法建立性功能障碍与 SCI 康复结果之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a cross-sectional analysis, precluding the establishment of causality between sexual dysfunction and SCI rehabilitation outcomes.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored physiotherapists' experiences treating children with cerebral palsy (CP) experiencing pain (N=8 interviews), identifying themes like facilitating well-being through bodily practice, embracing body experiences for pain interpretation, and building alliances with children based on safety, trust, and respect.
items.curatedReason: 处理脑瘫患儿疼痛时，你不应只关注生理层面。这项定性研究（N=8）提示，建立基于安全、信任和尊重的医患联盟，并引导患儿理解自身身体体验，对提升其整体福祉至关重要。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是帮助他们过上有意义的生活。”物理治疗师治疗脑瘫患儿疼痛的经验——一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究（N=8 访谈）探讨了物理治疗师在治疗脑瘫（CP）患儿疼痛时的经验，发现主要主题包括通过身体治疗实践促进福祉、将身体体验作为理解和治疗疼痛的起点，以及基于安全、信任和尊重与儿童建立联盟。
items.curatedReasonEn: When treating pain in children with cerebral palsy, you shouldn't focus solely on the physiological aspect. This qualitative study (N=8) suggests that building alliances based on safety, trust, and respect, and guiding children to interpret their own bodily experiences, are crucial for enhancing their overall well-being.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小（8 名物理治疗师），结果的普遍性受限，且基于自我报告的经验。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), limiting the generalizability of findings, and relies on self-reported experiences.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Kinesiophobia and its impact on shoulder function in patients following arthroscopic rotator cuff repair of the supraspinatus tendon: a cross-sectional study
items.summary: This cross-sectional study (N=129) assessed shoulder function and kinesiophobia levels in patients six weeks after arthroscopic rotator cuff repair of the supraspinatus tendon, exploring their interrelationships to inform recovery and patient outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 肩袖修复术后患者的运动恐惧症（kinesiophobia）是一个关键的心理康复障碍。这项研究通过评估术后 6 周的运动恐惧症与肩关节功能的关系，提示早期识别和干预运动恐惧症可能有助于改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 肩袖修复术后患者的运动恐惧症及其对肩关节功能的影响：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究（N=129）评估了在肩袖关节镜修复术后 6 周患者的肩关节功能和运动恐惧症水平，并探讨了它们之间的相互关系，以期为改善康复和患者预后提供见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiophobia is a critical psychological barrier to rehabilitation in patients after rotator cuff repair. This study, by evaluating the relationship between kinesiophobia and shoulder function 6 weeks post-surgery, suggests that early identification and intervention for kinesiophobia may improve patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法确定运动恐惧症与肩关节功能之间的因果关系，且随访时间较短（6周）。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to determine causality between kinesiophobia and shoulder function, and has a short follow-up period (6 weeks).

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized, single-blind, controlled trial investigated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽困难是影响患者生活质量的重要问题。这项随机对照试验显示，沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练在改善卒中后吞咽困难方面可能具有良好疗效和安全性，为你的康复方案提供了新的技术选择。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机、单盲、对照试验研究了沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Post-stroke dysphagia significantly impacts quality of life. This randomized controlled trial suggests that immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training may be effective and safe for improving post-stroke dysphagia, offering a new technological option for your rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 该研究为单盲试验，可能存在一定偏倚，且长期疗效和不同人群的适用性仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-blind trial, which may introduce bias, and long-term efficacy and applicability to different populations require further research.

items.title: Associations of exercise frequency and type with trajectories of daily activity limitations among older adults in the UK
items.summary: This study examined how exercise frequency and type are associated with trajectories of daily activity limitations among older adults in the UK, aiming to understand their joint effects on delaying functional decline.
items.curatedReason: 了解不同运动频率和类型对老年人日常活动限制轨迹的影响，有助于你为患者提供更精准的运动建议。这项研究揭示了英国老年人群中的这些关联，强调了定期运动在延缓功能衰退中的作用。
items.titleZh: 英国老年人运动频率和类型与日常活动限制轨迹的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了英国老年人运动频率和类型与日常活动限制轨迹的关联，旨在了解它们在延缓功能衰退方面的联合作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding how different exercise frequencies and types impact trajectories of daily activity limitations in older adults helps you provide more precise exercise recommendations. This study reveals these associations in the UK older adult population, highlighting the role of regular exercise in delaying functional decline.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法确定运动频率/类型与日常活动限制轨迹之间的因果关系，且基于自我报告的运动数据可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding causal inference between exercise frequency/type and daily activity limitation trajectories, and self-reported exercise data may be subject to recall bias.

items.title: Timely management of COPD exacerbations is associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery: a prospective observational study
items.summary: This prospective observational study found that timely management of acute exacerbations of COPD (AECOPDs) is associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery, highlighting the importance of early recognition and prompt treatment in routine outpatient settings.
items.curatedReason: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）急性加重（AECOPDs）的及时管理对患者康复至关重要。这项前瞻性观察研究强调，早期识别和治疗与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关，这强化了你在临床实践中快速响应 AECOPDs 的重要性。
items.titleZh: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病急性加重及时管理与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关：一项前瞻性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究发现，慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）急性加重（AECOPDs）的及时管理与有限的急性恶化和早期恢复相关，强调了在常规门诊环境中早期识别和及时治疗的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Timely management of acute exacerbations of COPD (AECOPDs) is crucial for patient recovery. This prospective observational study emphasizes that early recognition and treatment are associated with limited acute deterioration and early recovery, reinforcing the importance of rapid response to AECOPDs in your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法排除混杂因素对及时管理与预后之间关联的影响，且结果可能不具备普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding the exclusion of confounders influencing the association between timely management and prognosis, and results may not be generalizable.

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (N=590) aimed to develop and validate a machine learning model for predicting reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters available at hospital discharge.
items.curatedReason: 预测心血管外科术后运动不耐受能力有助于早期风险识别和干预。这项研究利用术后出院时的临床参数构建了机器学习模型，尽管仍在验证阶段，但预示着未来个性化康复方案的潜力。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管外科术后恢复期的运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究（N=590）旨在开发和验证一个机器学习模型，该模型利用心血管外科术后出院时的围手术期临床参数，预测患者术后 3 个月的运动能力下降情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: Predicting exercise intolerance after cardiovascular surgery helps in early risk identification and intervention. This study developed a machine learning model using clinical parameters available at hospital discharge, which, despite being in the validation phase, shows potential for future personalized rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性单中心研究，结果的外推性受限，且机器学习模型的验证仍在进行中。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective single-center study, limiting the generalizability of results, and the machine learning model validation is ongoing.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters

items.title: Ultrasound-guided platelet-rich plasma myofascial injection for chronic low back pain: a retrospective study
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (N=58) evaluated the efficacy and safety of ultrasound-guided myofascial platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injection compared to normal saline for myofascial pain syndrome-induced chronic low back pain, assessing pain intensity via VAS and functional disability by ODI.
items.curatedReason: 富血小板血浆（PRP）在慢性腰痛中的应用是一个热门但证据仍在积累的领域。这项回顾性研究提示超声引导下的 PRP 肌筋膜注射对肌筋膜疼痛综合征引起的慢性腰痛可能有效，但结果仍需更高质量的 RCT 验证。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下富血小板血浆肌筋膜注射治疗慢性腰痛：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究（N=58）评估了超声引导下富血小板血浆（PRP）肌筋膜注射与生理盐水相比，治疗肌筋膜疼痛综合征引起的慢性腰痛的疗效和安全性，通过 VAS 评估疼痛强度，ODI 评估功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Platelet-rich plasma (PRP) in chronic low back pain is a trending field with accumulating evidence. This retrospective study suggests that ultrasound-guided PRP myofascial injection may be effective for chronic low back pain caused by myofascial pain syndrome, but higher quality RCTs are needed to validate these results.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，未随机分组，可能存在选择偏倚，且样本量较小。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study with no randomized allocation, potential for selection bias, and a small sample size.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This study investigated the impact of demographics, sport profile, and physical activity on pelvic floor knowledge and dysfunctions in female athletes, noting that high-impact sports may exacerbate pelvic floor dysfunctions.
items.curatedReason: 女性运动员的盆底功能障碍是一个常被忽视的问题。该观察研究提示，参与高冲击性运动可能加重盆底功能障碍。评估时应更关注运动员的人口统计学特征、运动类型和活动水平，以便识别高风险个体并提供早期干预。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员盆底知识与功能障碍：人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动对女性运动员盆底健康知识和功能障碍的影响，指出高冲击性运动可能会加剧盆底功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor dysfunction in female athletes is an often overlooked issue. This observational study suggests high-impact sports may exacerbate these dysfunctions. Pay closer attention to athletes' demographics, sport profiles, and activity levels during assessment to identify high-risk individuals and provide early intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究的详细设计（横断面/队列等）及样本量在摘要中未明确提及，影响对证据强度的判断。
items.limitationEn: The detailed study design (e.g., cross-sectional/cohort) and sample size are not explicitly mentioned in the abstract, affecting the assessment of evidence strength.

items.title: Expert consensus on the management of nocturnal enuresis in children
items.summary: This expert consensus updates the 2014 guidelines on managing nocturnal enuresis in children, incorporating substantial clinical experience and international guidelines to address its impact on children's physical and psychological health.
items.curatedReason: 儿童夜间遗尿影响广泛，最新管理策略至关重要。这份专家共识更新了 2014 年版指南，融合了新的临床经验和国际指导，你应该参照它来标准化你的诊断和治疗流程。
items.titleZh: 儿童夜间遗尿管理专家共识
items.summaryZh: 这份专家共识更新了 2014 年版儿童夜间遗尿管理指南，结合了丰富的临床经验和国际指南，旨在解决夜间遗尿对儿童身心健康的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Nocturnal enuresis in children has broad impacts, and up-to-date management strategies are crucial. This expert consensus updates the 2014 guidelines, integrating new clinical experience and international guidance; you should refer to it to standardize your diagnostic and treatment processes.

items.title: Clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods: a systematic review with limited meta-analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: This systematic review with limited meta-analysis evaluated the clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods, providing insights for orthopaedic practice.
items.curatedReason: 3D 打印固定支具的临床和功能结果综述提供了新兴技术的证据基础。如果你在考虑或已经在使用 3D 打印技术辅助上肢固定，这份系统综述可以帮你评估其与传统方法的优劣，从而优化临床决策。
items.titleZh: 上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法的临床和功能结果比较：一项包含有限 Meta 分析的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项包含有限 Meta 分析的系统综述，比较了上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法的临床和功能结果，为骨科实践提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review of clinical and functional outcomes for 3D-printed immobilization devices provides an evidence base for emerging technology. If you are considering or already using 3D printing for upper extremity immobilization, this systematic review can help you evaluate its advantages and disadvantages compared to traditional methods, thus optimizing clinical decision-making.
items.limitation: 受限于所纳入研究的质量和异质性，有限的 Meta 分析可能无法得出明确的统计结论。
items.limitationEn: Limited meta-analysis may not yield definitive statistical conclusions due to the quality and heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: Factors influencing virtual reality use in paediatric acquired ...
items.summary: This qualitative study explored factors influencing virtual reality (VR) use in pediatric acquired brain injury upper limb rehabilitation, providing insights into practical implementation.
items.curatedReason: 别盲目引入 VR 到儿科脑损伤上肢康复中。这项定性研究揭示了影响其应用的实际因素。你应该了解这些障碍与促进因素，才能更有效地整合 VR 技术，确保其在临床实践中的成功。
items.titleZh: 影响虚拟现实在儿科获得性脑损伤上肢康复中使用的因素：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了影响虚拟现实（VR）在儿科获得性脑损伤上肢康复中使用的因素，为实际应用提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Don't blindly introduce VR into pediatric acquired brain injury upper limb rehabilitation. This qualitative study reveals practical factors influencing its use. You should understand these barriers and facilitators to integrate VR technology more effectively and ensure its success in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果的普遍性受限，主要关注使用者感知而非客观疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, limiting generalizability, and focuses on user perceptions rather than objective efficacy.

items.title: Activity profiles and their associations with transitions between fall and dementia: findings from a multistate time-to-event analysis
items.summary: This study, using a multistate time-to-event analysis, investigated the associations of activity profiles with transitions between falls and dementia, providing insights into potential risk factors in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 跌倒和痴呆是老年人常见的双重打击。这项研究通过多状态时间事件分析，探讨了不同日常活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联，提示特定活动模式可能预示这两种不良结局，这有助于你进行早期风险评估。
items.titleZh: 活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联：一项多状态时间事件分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究利用多状态时间事件分析，调查了活动模式与跌倒和痴呆之间转换的关联，为老年人潜在的风险因素提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Falls and dementia are common dual burdens in older adults. This study, using multistate time-to-event analysis, explores the association between daily activity profiles and transitions between falls and dementia, suggesting that specific activity patterns may predict these adverse outcomes. This can aid in early risk assessment.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法建立活动模式与跌倒/痴呆转换之间的因果关系，且结果可能受其他未测量混杂因素影响。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design, precluding causal inference between activity profiles and transitions to falls/dementia, and results may be influenced by unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Smartphone apps, wearable trackers helped people with heart disease boost physical activity
items.summary: An analysis of previous research published in the Journal of the American Heart Association found that smartphone apps, fitness trackers, and wearable devices helped people with heart disease boost physical activity, which is crucial for preventing additional cardiovascular events.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机应用和可穿戴设备在帮助心脏病患者增加体力活动方面的作用日益显著。这项研究分析指出，这些技术是促进心血管疾病患者重获运动能力、预防二次事件的有效辅助工具。
items.titleZh: 智能手机应用和可穿戴设备帮助心脏病患者增加体力活动
items.summaryZh: 《美国心脏协会杂志》发表的一项研究分析发现，智能手机应用、健身追踪器和可穿戴设备有助于心脏病患者增加体力活动，这对于预防额外的心血管事件至关重要。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone apps and wearable devices are increasingly important in helping people with heart disease increase physical activity. This analysis indicates these technologies are effective aids in promoting exercise capacity and preventing secondary events in cardiovascular disease patients.
items.limitation: 作为对现有研究的分析，其结论强度取决于原始研究的质量和异质性，可能无法提供确凿的因果证据。
items.limitationEn: As an analysis of existing research, the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality and heterogeneity of the original studies, and it may not provide definitive causal evidence.

items.title: Harnessing neuroplasticity to improve motor performance ...
items.summary: This study protocol outlines the design for the GAME randomized controlled trial, which aims to harness neuroplasticity to improve motor performance in infants with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项研究方案，而非结果。GAME RCT 旨在通过神经可塑性改善脑瘫婴儿运动表现。你在设计类似儿童神经康复研究时，可以参考其方法学框架，但切勿将其内容作为临床实践依据。
items.titleZh: 利用神经可塑性改善脑瘫婴儿运动表现：GAME 随机对照试验的研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究方案概述了 GAME 随机对照试验的设计，该试验旨在利用神经可塑性来改善脑瘫婴儿的运动表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a study protocol, not a result. The GAME RCT aims to improve motor performance in infants with cerebral palsy by harnessing neuroplasticity. You may refer to its methodological framework when designing similar pediatric neurorehabilitation studies, but do not use its content as a basis for clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布结果，无法评估干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol with no results yet, so the intervention's effectiveness cannot be evaluated.

items.title: Corynoxine inhibts ferroptosis by SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 axis on traumatic brain injury
items.summary: This study investigated Corynoxine's neuroprotective effects against traumatic brain injury (TBI) in a mouse model and Erastin-induced HT-22 neuronal cells, elucidating its mechanism in inhibiting ferroptosis via the SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 signaling axis.
items.curatedReason: Corynoxine 在创伤性脑损伤（TBI）中的神经保护作用研究提供了潜在的药物干预方向。尽管这项研究主要关注分子机制，但其发现可能启发未来结合药物和物理康复的 TBI 治疗策略。
items.titleZh: Corynoxine 通过 SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 轴抑制铁死亡，对抗创伤性脑损伤
items.summaryZh: 这项研究在小鼠模型和 Erastin 诱导的 HT-22 神经元细胞中，探讨了 Corynoxine 对创伤性脑损伤（TBI）的神经保护作用，阐明了其通过 SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 信号轴抑制铁死亡的机制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Research into the neuroprotective effects of Corynoxine in traumatic brain injury (TBI) offers a potential direction for pharmacological intervention. Although this study primarily focuses on molecular mechanisms, its findings may inspire future TBI treatment strategies combining medication and physical rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究主要基于动物模型和细胞实验，其结果的临床转化性和在人体 TBI 中的疗效尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This study is primarily based on animal models and cell experiments, so the clinical translatability and efficacy in human TBI are unclear.

items.title: Neuroprotective Effects of lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 Against Ischemic Stroke Injury Through Regulating Microglial State Transition and Ferroptosis via miR-214-3p/GPX4 Axis
items.summary: This study investigated the neuroprotective effects of lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 against ischemic stroke injury by regulating microglial state transition and ferroptosis via the miR-214-3p/GPX4 axis.
items.curatedReason: 这项基础研究揭示了 lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 在缺血性卒中损伤中通过调控小胶质细胞和铁死亡的神经保护机制。尽管目前尚不能直接指导临床，但它为未来卒中康复的分子靶点干预提供了重要的理论线索和研究方向。
items.titleZh: lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 通过 miR-214-3p/GPX4 轴调控小胶质细胞状态转换和铁死亡，发挥抗缺血性卒中损伤的神经保护作用
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了 lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 通过 miR-214-3p/GPX4 轴调控小胶质细胞状态转换和铁死亡，从而对抗缺血性卒中损伤的神经保护作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigates the neuroprotective effects of lncRNA EPB41L4A-AS1 against ischemic stroke injury by regulating microglial state transition and ferroptosis. Although it is a basic mechanistic study, it provides clues for future molecular target interventions in stroke rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究主要关注分子机制，其结果的临床转化性和在人体卒中康复中的应用仍需大量研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This study primarily focuses on molecular mechanisms, and its clinical translatability and application in human stroke rehabilitation still require extensive research validation.

items.title: A Scoping Review of Methods for Extrapolating Costs and Effects in Economic Evaluations of Remote Monitoring
items.summary: This scoping review highlighted methodological limitations in economic evaluations of remote monitoring, particularly regarding methods for extrapolating costs and effects over the long term, noting insufficient methodological quality in current long-term investigations.
items.curatedReason: 在评估远程监测技术的经济效益时，务必警惕其长期成本和效果外推的方法学缺陷。这份范围综述指出，现有长期研究的方法学质量不足，你解读相关经济评估报告时应更加审慎，不宜轻易下定论。
items.titleZh: 远程监测经济学评估中成本和效应外推方法学的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述强调了远程监测经济学评估中的方法学局限性，特别是在长期成本和效应外推方面，指出当前长期调查的方法学质量不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: When evaluating the economic benefits of remote monitoring technologies, be highly aware of methodological flaws in extrapolating long-term costs and effects. This scoping review points out that the methodological quality of current long-term investigations is insufficient; you should interpret relevant economic evaluation reports with greater caution and avoid making premature conclusions.

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model achieved 70.9% plan-of-care completion, exceeding national benchmarks (43%), with 96% of completers achieving Minimal Clinically Important Differences.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟物理治疗模式在骨科康复中展现出高患者依从性和临床效果。这提示远程医疗在解决依从性、提高疗效方面潜力巨大，值得你深入探索并考虑将其纳入诊疗路径，尤其对依从性差的患者。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模式的患者依从性、临床结局及满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究发现，先进的骨科虚拟物理治疗模式实现了 70.9% 的治疗计划完成率，超过全国基准（43%），其中 96% 的完成者达到了临床最小重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual physical therapy models show high patient engagement and clinical outcomes in orthopedic rehabilitation. This suggests significant potential for telemedicine in improving adherence and efficacy, warranting your exploration and consideration for integration into care pathways, especially for patients with low adherence.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性队列设计，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study is a retrospective cohort design, which may have selection bias and confounding factors.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) Application in Neurorehabilitation: A Beginner’s Guide for Clinicians
items.summary: Transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) is a noninvasive brain stimulation technique that modulates brain excitability by altering neuronal resting membrane potential. It is highlighted for its clinical accessibility, low cost (often <$1k), small footprint, and minimal training requirements.
items.curatedReason: tDCS 作为一种非侵入性脑刺激技术，其临床可及性（低成本、便携）和与康复治疗结合的潜力，意味着你可以在神经康复中探索更经济、更便捷的辅助手段。但请注意，作为初学者，需要仔细理解其作用机制和适应证。
items.titleZh: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）在神经康复中的应用：临床医生入门指南
items.summaryZh: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）是一种非侵入性脑刺激技术，通过改变神经元静息膜电位来调节脑兴奋性。该技术因其临床可及性、低成本（通常低于 1000 美元）、小巧便携以及所需培训时间短而备受关注。
items.curatedReasonEn: tDCS, as a noninvasive brain stimulation technique, offers clinical accessibility (low cost, portability) and potential integration with rehabilitation therapy. This means you can explore more economical and convenient adjunctive therapies in neurorehabilitation. As a beginner, carefully understand its mechanism of action and indications.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps of telerehabilitation studies for stroke survivors during the hospital-to-home transition, based on searches up to May 2026.
items.curatedReason: 这份综述提示我们，卒中患者出院后远程康复的干预模型和测量指标仍缺乏标准化。在实践中，这意味着我们尚不能确定哪种远程方案最有效，更多研究需要聚焦填补这些证据空白。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者出院返家阶段远程康复：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统梳理了截至 2026 年 5 月的文献，识别并映射了卒中幸存者从医院到家庭过渡期间远程康复的干预模型、结局领域和证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review suggests that telerehabilitation intervention models and outcome measures for stroke survivors post-discharge still lack standardization. In practice, this means we can't yet definitively say which telerehab approach is most effective, and more research is needed to fill these evidence gaps.
items.limitation: 本综述属于范围综述，而非系统评价，主要旨在识别和映射文献，不进行质量评估或综合效应量分析。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, not a systematic review, primarily focused on identifying and mapping literature rather than quality assessment or pooled effect size analysis.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicenter cross-sectional study via online survey (Feb-Jun 2025) characterized the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对西班牙私立前庭物理治疗诊所患者的横断面研究显示，该市场前庭康复患者的特征值得我们关注。了解这些患者的人口学、临床特征和就医模式，有助于优化你在该地区的诊所运营和市场策略。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私立前庭物理治疗诊所患者画像：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项通过在线问卷（2025 年 2 月至 6 月）进行的多中心横断面研究，描绘了西班牙私立前庭物理治疗诊所患者的人口学、临床和医疗利用特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study of patients in Spanish private vestibular physiotherapy clinics highlights important patient characteristics in that market. Understanding these patients' demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles can help you optimize your clinic operations and market strategies in the region.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，只能揭示相关性，无法确立因果关系；且数据来源于在线问卷，可能存在回忆偏倚和选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study can only identify associations, not causal relationships. Data collected via online survey may be subject to recall and selection bias.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Digital Addiction and Body Balance: An Investigation of Postural Stability in Young Adults: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 74 young adults (mean age 22.06 years) found an association between smartphone addiction and impaired postural balance performance, with attention-demanding tasks further affecting balance control.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机成瘾正悄然影响年轻人的姿势和平衡，这篇观察性研究提示我们应关注数字设备过度使用对肌骨健康的潜在风险，尤其是在评估平衡障碍时。
items.titleZh: 数字成瘾与身体平衡：青年人姿势稳定性调查的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 74 名年轻人（平均年龄 22.06 岁）进行的横断面研究发现，智能手机成瘾与姿势平衡能力受损之间存在关联，且对注意力要求高的任务会进一步影响平衡控制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone addiction is subtly impacting posture and balance in young adults. This observational study suggests we should consider the potential musculoskeletal health risks of excessive digital device use, especially when evaluating balance impairments.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立数字成瘾与姿势平衡障碍之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish a causal relationship between digital addiction and postural balance impairments.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia) and objective measures of balance and gait in hemiparetic individuals.
items.curatedReason: 这篇研究量化了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍与平衡/步态参数的关联，帮你更精确地评估卒中后患者的本体感觉缺损如何影响其功能恢复，指导康复干预的侧重点。
items.titleZh: 偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉对平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍（包括足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉）与平衡和步态客观测量指标之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study quantifies the association between lower limb proprioceptive deficits and balance/gait parameters in hemiparetic patients. This helps you more precisely assess how proprioceptive impairments affect functional recovery post-stroke and guides the focus of rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法确立本体感觉障碍与平衡步态参数之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This observational study design cannot establish a causal relationship between proprioceptive impairment and balance/gait parameters.
items.journal: Gait & posture

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey in Vietnam investigated current assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain (PSSP) among rehabilitation professionals, aiming to identify evidence and practice gaps as well as barriers to effective care.
items.curatedReason: 越南康复专业人员对卒中后肩痛的评估和管理实践与现有指南存在明显差距。这意味着在资源有限或中低收入地区，指南的推广和落地仍面临挑战，你可能需要根据当地具体情况调整干预策略。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛评估与管理实践：一项横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 越南一项横断面调查旨在评估该国康复专业人员对卒中后肩痛（PSSP）的当前评估和管理实践，以识别潜在的证据与实践差距及有效护理的障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Current assessment and management of post-stroke shoulder pain by rehabilitation professionals in Vietnam significantly diverge from existing guidelines. This indicates that guideline implementation remains a challenge in resource-limited or low-to-middle-income settings, and you may need to adapt your intervention strategies to local contexts.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅能反映特定时间点的实践情况，无法建立因果关系或评估干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey reflects practices at a specific time point and cannot establish causality or assess the effectiveness of interventions.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, hypothesizing lower activity in the ACLR group and examining bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后单腿跳跃任务中，小腿三头肌（比目鱼肌、腓肠肌）的神经肌肉活动可能存在不对称。这提示你在重返运动评估中，除了关注股四头肌和蕕绳肌，也应细致评估小腿肌肉的功能对称性。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌的肌电（EMG）活动，并探讨了ACL重建组内部的双侧差异，假设重建组活动度更低。
items.curatedReasonEn: Asymmetrical triceps surae (soleus, gastrocnemius) neuromuscular activity may be present during single-leg jumping tasks after ACL reconstruction. This suggests that in return-to-sport assessments, beyond quadriceps and hamstrings, you should meticulously evaluate calf muscle functional symmetry.
items.limitation: 研究样本量、特定任务选择以及EMG的局限性可能影响结果的外推性。此外，缺乏长期随访数据来评估这些差异与再损伤风险的关系。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of the results may be limited by sample size, specific task selection, and EMG limitations. Furthermore, long-term follow-up data is absent to assess the relationship between these differences and re-injury risk.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey investigated factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training in pediatric and adolescent patients following ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 血流限制训练（BFRT）在青少年 ACL 康复中应用日益广泛，但临床实践与研究证据之间仍有差距。了解当前临床 PT 如何应用 BFRT，有助于你审视自身实践，并思考如何在青少年患者中更有效地整合最新证据。
items.titleZh: 影响小儿和青少年 ACL 损伤后血流限制训练临床决策的因素。
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查研究了影响物理治疗师在小儿和青少年 ACL 损伤后应用血流限制训练（BFRT）的临床决策因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood Flow Restriction Training (BFRT) is increasingly used in pediatric and adolescent ACL rehabilitation, yet a gap exists between clinical practice and research evidence. Understanding how PTs currently apply BFRT can help you evaluate your own practice and consider how to better integrate the latest evidence for adolescent patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅能描述相关性，无法确立因果关系；且依赖 PT 自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey can only describe associations, not causality; it relies on self-reported data from PTs, which may be subject to recall bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: A scoping review of outcome and outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury.
items.summary: A scoping review identified outcome domains and measures in core outcome sets for stroke, traumatic brain injury, and spinal cord injury, noting that existing sets have not been synthesized across conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述提示，核心结局集和标准结局测量集在神经康复领域存在异质性。在设计你的临床路径和研究方案时，注意不同神经损伤（脊髓、卒中、脑外伤）间的测量工具可能缺乏统一性。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人结局及其测量集范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了卒中、创伤性脑损伤和脊髓损伤的核心结局集与标准结局测量集中的结局域和测量方法，并指出现有集合尚未在不同疾病间进行整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review indicates heterogeneity in core outcome sets and standard outcome measures across neurorehabilitation. When designing your clinical pathways and research protocols, be aware that measurement tools may lack uniformity across different neurological injuries (spinal cord, stroke, TBI).
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，侧重梳理现有研究的范围和类型，未进行荟萃分析或提供效应量。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, focused on mapping the scope and types of existing research rather than conducting meta-analysis or providing effect sizes.
items.journal: Journal of rehabilitation medicine

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind RCT (n=28) found dynamic taping and sports taping had similar immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步的 RCT 提示，动态贴扎和运动贴扎在改善慢性踝关节不稳患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面效果相似。你可以根据患者反馈和自身经验，灵活选择两种贴扎技术。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳业余运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲随机对照试验（n=28）显示，动态贴扎和运动贴扎在改善慢性踝关节不稳业余运动员的动态平衡和本体感觉方面，即时效果相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary RCT suggests that dynamic taping and sports taping have similar immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability. You can choose between the two taping techniques based on patient feedback and your clinical experience.
items.limitation: 本研究为单盲小样本 RCT (n=28)，且只评估了即时效应，长期效果和患者依从性尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-blind, small-sample RCT (n=28) that only assessed immediate effects; long-term efficacy and patient adherence remain unclear.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A 6-week RCT (N=33) on chronic stroke patients found that Kinesio or Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training improved ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion, static balance, dynamic balance, and ankle stability more than treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: 在慢性卒中患者踝关节功能障碍的康复中，Mulligan 和 Kinesio 贴扎结合跑步机训练，与单纯跑步机训练相比，显示出对踝关节背屈 ROM、平衡和踝关节稳定性的额外益处。将贴扎作为辅助手段考虑，但注意小样本和短期的研究局限。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能生物力学效应的随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 6 周的随机对照试验（N=33）显示，在慢性卒中患者中，Kinesio 或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练比单纯跑步机训练能更显著地改善踝关节背屈活动度、静态与动态平衡以及踝关节稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: In chronic stroke rehabilitation for ankle dysfunction, Mulligan and Kinesio taping combined with treadmill training showed additional benefits for ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle stability compared to treadmill training alone. Consider taping as an adjunct, but note the small sample size and short-term limitations.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小 (N=33)，且随访期较短，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study had a small sample size (N=33) and a short follow-up period, limiting the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Clinical biomechanics (Bristol, Avon)

items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials found that combined biopsychosocial interventions are effective in reducing pain and functional disability in adults with chronic low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会干预已被本综述坐实对慢性腰痛有显著疗效。这巩固了这类多模式干预在临床实践中的一线地位，下次跟患者沟通时要强调其全面性。
items.titleZh: 生物心理社会联合干预对慢性腰痛的疗效：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，生物心理社会联合干预能有效减轻慢性腰痛成年患者的疼痛和功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review confirms that biopsychosocial interventions are significantly effective for chronic low back pain. This solidifies their first-line status in clinical practice, and you should emphasize their comprehensive nature when discussing with patients.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告具体的效应量和异质性数据。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report specific effect sizes and heterogeneity data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: A study evaluated the validity and reliability of the DOPSknee tool for assessing knee joint mobilization skills in 42 preclinical physical therapy students, finding good on-site inter-rater reliability.
items.curatedReason: DOPSknee 工具的有效性和可靠性数据出炉，为膝关节松动术的教学与评估提供了标准化工具。这有助于确保学生在临床前阶段就掌握扎实的核心技能，并能在远程教学中保持评估质量。
items.titleZh: 膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPS）工具在物理治疗教育中现场及异地应用的效度和信度
items.summaryZh: 一项研究评估了 DOPSknee 工具在 42 名临床前物理治疗学生中评估膝关节松动术技能的效度和信度，结果显示现场评估的评价者间信度良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: The DOPSknee tool's validity and reliability data are now available, offering a standardized instrument for teaching and assessing knee joint mobilization. This helps ensure students acquire solid core skills in preclinical stages and maintains assessment quality in off-site settings.
items.limitation: 研究样本量为 42 名学生，可能影响结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study sample size was 42 students, which may affect the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study, based on a questionnaire completed by 1,175 Portuguese stroke survivors 18-24 months post-stroke, explored their experiences with professional reintegration, focusing on perceived consequences, barriers, and enablers for return to work.
items.curatedReason: 此观察研究提示了影响卒中后患者重返工作岗位的关键因素。临床上，应关注这些障碍和促进因素，以更好地支持患者的职业康复。
items.titleZh: 中风后职业再融入：葡萄牙中风幸存者的经历
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究基于 1,175 名葡萄牙中风幸存者在发病后 18-24 个月完成的问卷，探讨了他们重返工作岗位的经历，重点关注了感知到的后果、障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests key factors influencing return to work for stroke survivors. Clinically, focus on these barriers and enablers to better support vocational rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性队列设计，可能存在回忆偏倚和未控制的混杂因素，且仅限于葡萄牙人群，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study is a retrospective cohort design, potentially subject to recall bias and unmeasured confounders, and limited to the Portuguese population, restricting generalizability.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients demonstrated that incomplete routine neuropsychological assessment data can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables, supporting group-level stratification.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，即使在数据不完整的情况下，常规神经心理学评估数据仍能为中风后认知功能提供有临床意义的见解。这提示你，不必因数据不全而放弃分析，可以从中提取模式来优化康复策略。
items.titleZh: 急性期后中风康复中不完整的认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 2654 名急性期后中风患者的回顾性队列研究表明，即使是不完整的常规神经心理学评估数据，仍能揭示认知、临床和背景变量之间具有临床可解释的关系，并支持群体分层。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that routine neuropsychological assessment data can still provide clinically interpretable insights into post-stroke cognitive function, even with incomplete data. This suggests that you don't need to abandon analysis due to incomplete data and can extract patterns to optimize rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，数据来自单一中心，可能存在选择偏倚，且认知评估并非标准化设计。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective cohort study, data from a single center, potentially subject to selection bias, and cognitive assessments were not standardly designed.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
